studies.title: Evaluation of the effectiveness of a digital support tool (Mika-App) for cancer patients under clinical routine conditions at the Comprehensive Cancer Center Central Germany (CCCG): Effects on self-management skills, psychological distress, and quality of life

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'Mika-App,' which matches the product name provided. The study focuses on cancer patients, aligning with the clinical area and description of the Mika App. Although the abstract and intervention details are not available, the title provides sufficient evidence to confirm relevance.

_classification.reason: The study evaluates the effectiveness of a digital support tool under clinical routine conditions, which suggests an observational design rather than a controlled, randomized intervention.
